---
title: "Longitudinal treatments: ICE g-computation (Chapter 21)"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Longitudinal treatments: ICE g-computation}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO: write longitudinal vignette -->
<!-- Cover: ICE g-computation (Zivich et al. 2024), to_person_period(),   -->
<!-- causat(id=, time=), static vs dynamic interventions, sandwich variance -->
